description: Completed early schooling at Rose Public School, building a foundation in academics and communication skills over six years.

Completed the rest 6 years of schooling under the CBSE (Central Board of Secondary Education) curriculum as part of the Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan — a nationwide network of central government schools. With the Science stream, securing 94.4% in Class 10 board examinations and over 90% in the Class 12 board examinations. Secured a rank of 75552 in JEE Mains with 93.3%tile.
points: Specialized in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics (PCM) along with Computer Science.
Built a strong academic foundation in mathematics, logic, and problem-solving, preparing for technical higher education.
Gained early exposure to programming fundamentals, including basic OOP and Python.
Participated in school-level science exhibitions, Olympiads, and computer literacy initiatives.
Developed discipline, adaptability, and academic consistency in a nationally standardized school system.
Built a solid understanding of OOP, software design principles, and version control with Git/GitHub.

description: Currently pursuing a 4-year undergraduate program in Computer Science and Engineering with current CGPA above 9.0. Gaining a strong foundation in software development, systems, and emerging technologies through academic and project-based learning. Core coursework includes Data Structures, Algorithms, Operating Systems, and Programming.
points: Studied core subjects including Data Structures & Algorithms, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, and Database Management Systems.
Worked on academic and personal projects involving Web Development, App development, Open Source projects, REST API design, and Python-based applications.
Participated in coding competitions, hackathons, and peer programming sessions to strengthen problem-solving skills.
Actively exploring areas like Machine Learning, LLMs and AI agents, Low Level Programming, and full-stack development through self-learning and internships.

description: Developed and maintained scalable RESTful APIs using Python (Flask), MongoDB, and MySQL, supporting core car-sharing platform features such as DMs, Ask to Verify, and Recurring Trips for 500+ users. Implemented robust input validation, error handling, and unit testing to ensure reliability, safety, and maintainability. Deployed and monitored backend services on AWS, optimizing performance, reducing latency by 40%, and lowering infrastructure costs by 15%, while collaborating closely with frontend teams for seamless integration.
points: Developed and deployed core car-sharing features, including direct messaging (DMs), Ask to Verify, and Recurring Trips, improving user safety and retention across a platform with 500+ downloads.
Architected scalable backend services using Python (Flask), MongoDB, and MySQL, reducing API latency by 40% and infrastructure costs by 15% on AWS.
Designed and maintained RESTful APIs enabling efficient CRUD operations and seamless front-end integration.
Optimized ride-hosting workflows, reducing listing time by 30% and improving search-to-match efficiency by 20% through a redesigned Connections and date-filtering system.
Designed Flask routes, services, and models aligned with REST standards and internal best practices.
Implemented robust data validation, error handling, and response management to ensure API reliability and user safety.
Optimized MongoDB queries to enhance API response time and backend performance.
Wrote unit tests to validate API functionality and ensure high code quality and coverage.
Collaborated closely with frontend teams to integrate APIs with UI components for end-to-end feature delivery.
Managed, deployed, and monitored backend services on AWS, contributing to CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure improvements.
Conducted API testing and debugging to resolve backend issues efficiently.
Suggested and implemented improvements to enhance code maintainability, scalability, and performance.
Worked in Agile development environments using Git and modern cloud-based development tools.
